description: Found 'subprocess' function 'run' with 'shell=True'. This is dangerous because this call will spawn the command using a shell process. Doing so propagates current shell settings and variables, which makes it much easier for a malicious actor to execute commands. Use 'shell=False' instead.
human_readable_alert:
⚠ SECURITY ALERT

File: test.py
Line: 4
Rule ID: python.lang.security.audit.subprocess-shell-true.subprocess-shell-true
Severity: ERROR
Risk Score: 10/10

Issue:
Found 'subprocess' function 'run' with 'shell=True'. This is dangerous because this call will spawn the command using a shell process. Doing so propagates current shell settings and variables, which makes it much easier for a malicious actor to execute commands. Use 'shell=False' instead.

Recommendation:
Review this code immediately and apply secure coding best practices.
